overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a derelict urban area in Night City. The player character walks past a burning vehicle, under an overpass, along a graffiti-covered sidewalk, up a stairwell, and onto an elevated walkway overlooking a busy highway with towering neon-lit megabuildings visible in the hazy distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: derelict urban lot with burning vehicle

agents.ego_description: walking through debris-filled lot toward a concrete overpass, passing a burning wrecked car on the right

notable_agents.action: burning wrecked car emitting flames and smoke

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass spanning across the scene
towering skyscrapers with bright neon holographic advertisements
abandoned low-rise structure with broken windows

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a derelict urban lot at night, with a burning vehicle illuminating the right side of the frame. The player walks forward through debris and dirt toward a concrete overpass, with towering neon-lit megabuildings visible in the hazy distance. The environment is exposed and open, with sparse vegetation and abandoned cars scattered around.

events.description: moves from open derelict lot into covered area beneath the overpass
blue bus passes by on the left side traveling parallel to the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to moving traffic, passing a blue bus on the left

notable_agents.action: blue public transit bus driving along the street

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful street art and murals
tall sodium vapor lamps illuminating the roadway
low concrete divider separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: The player moves from the open lot into a semi-covered area beneath the highway overpass, transitioning to a concrete sidewalk. A blue bus passes by on the left as the player walks alongside a graffiti-covered wall, with moderate traffic moving along the street. The lighting shifts to artificial street lamps and the glow from vehicle headlights.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairwell ascending to elevated walkway

events.description: begins ascending concrete stairs to reach upper level
exits dark stairwell onto illuminated elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: climbing concrete stairs along a graffiti-covered wall toward the upper level

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with metal railings
metal security fencing along the stairwell
large electrical equipment box with warning labels

segments.scene_description: Approaching a set of concrete stairs, the player begins ascending from street level to an elevated walkway. The environment becomes enclosed and darker within the stairwell, passing utility boxes and chain-link fencing. This segment marks the transition from the street sidewalk to the upper pedestrian infrastructure.

events.description: emerges from stairwell onto elevated walkway with view of highway below

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated overpass overlooking traffic and the city skyline

entered.detail: wide pedestrian bridge with concrete surface and metal railings
green metal safety railing along the walkway edge
large illuminated advertisement screen showing animated content
view of multi-lane highway with moving traffic below

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairwell onto an elevated walkway, the player overlooks a busy highway with multiple lanes of traffic below. The camera moves along the overpass railing with expansive views of the neon-lit megabuildings and digital billboards in the distance. The scene remains at night with artificial lighting dominating the urban landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a desolate urban lot into the towering, neon-lit heights of a futuristic city. It begins in an open, debris-strewn lot illuminated by a burning vehicle, moving forward toward a concrete overpass with hazy megabuildings looming in the distance. As the camera passes beneath the highway, the environment shifts from the open lot to a graffiti-covered sidewalk where the glow of street lamps and passing vehicle headlights replaces the firelight. The scene then narrows and darkens as the player ascends a concrete stairwell past utility boxes and chain-link fencing, transitioning from the street level to the upper pedestrian infrastructure. Finally, the camera emerges onto an elevated walkway, opening up to an expansive nighttime vista of a busy multi-lane highway and distant digital billboards.
